summary: Frontend UI/UX fixes verified: Mobile navbar safe-area, Arena card on Dashboard, Financial Balance collapsible section. All 6 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line ~450: Navbar has safe-area-inset-top padding - style={{ paddingTop: 'env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px)' }} - CORRECT
App.js line ~1107: Bottom mobile nav has safe-area-inset-bottom - style={{ height: 'calc(3.5rem + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px))', paddingBottom: 'env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)' }} - CORRECT
Dashboard.jsx line ~87: financeOpen state initialized to false (collapsed by default) - CORRECT
Dashboard.jsx line ~838-906: Financial Balance section uses AnimatePresence with Framer Motion for smooth expand/collapse animation - CORRECT
Dashboard.jsx line ~844: Toggle button has data-testid='financial-toggle-btn' - CORRECT
Dashboard.jsx line ~961-967: Arena card replaces old Ciak/shooting-shortcut with data-testid='arena-shortcut' - CORRECT
Dashboard.jsx line ~207: pvpStats SWR hook fetches /pvp-cinema/stats for Arena card display - CORRECT
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX fixes verified on mobile viewport (390x844). Daily Bonus popup and Velion tutorial overlay need to be dismissed after login before testing dashboard features. Use 'Riscuoti' for daily bonus, 'Salta' for Velion tutorial.

TEST_1_navbar_not_covering_title.details: Page title 'BENVENUTO IN CINEWORLD STUDIO'S' at y=64px, navbar height ~56px with safe-area-inset-top padding

TEST_2_arena_card_exists.details: Arena card found with data-testid='arena-shortcut', displays '2 azioni' (PvP stats)

TEST_3_shooting_shortcut_removed.details: Old data-testid='shooting-shortcut' card no longer exists on Dashboard

TEST_4_financial_balance_collapsible.details: Financial section starts collapsed (financeOpen=false), expands on click showing Speso/Guadagnato/Profitto grid with Framer Motion animation

TEST_5_bottom_mobile_nav_visible.details: Bottom mobile nav visible with Home, I Miei, Produci!, Mercato, Infra buttons

TEST_6_arena_card_navigation.details: Clicking Arena card navigates to /pvp-arena page showing genre sections with films

screenshots: .screenshots/dashboard_clean.png - Dashboard with title visible, not covered by navbar
.screenshots/financial_after_toggle.png - Financial Balance section expanded showing Speso/Guadagnato/Profitto
.screenshots/pvp_arena_final.png - PvP Arena page after clicking Arena card
